description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs npm i, npm run build, mv dist public, cp favicon.ico public/, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. Add a test job that runs on all branches except master, executes npm i and npm run build, and runs in the default test stage. No services, caches, or additional variables are needed.
